feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: Tyler Baeten's Academic CV and Portfolio.

entry.title: Welcome to My Tech Notes
entry.content:
Welcome to the Tech Notes section of my Academic Portfolio!

While the Projects section of this site is dedicated to long-form, deeply technical architectural write-ups (like my Docker setups and reverse proxy configurations), this blog will serve as a space for shorter, more frequent updates.

In the future, you can expect to see posts covering:

  • Home Lab Updates: Quick changes or upgrades I make to my server rack.
  • Software Discoveries: Interesting open-source projects or self-hosted apps I’m currently testing.
  • General Tech Thoughts: Shorter notes on IT engineering, systems administration, and DevOps principles.

Stay tuned for more content, and feel free to check out my Projects or my CV in the meantime!
entry.summary: A quick introduction to what you can expect from my technical blog.
